title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at PC Jeweller South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at PC Jeweller South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with PC Jeweller South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About PC Jeweller South Asia Partners:
PC Jeweller South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PC Jeweller South Asia Partners!
